content:
type: STATUS
files: tiktoken/core.py
summary: Added return_positions param to Encoding.encode (signature+docstring+body), plus new private helpers _encode_with_positions/_encode_ordinary_with_positions; done editing. Note: our changes both touch encode()'s signature/docstring so a merge will need manual reconciliation.
